name: Travel & Leisure Co.
summary: Company Overview Travel + Leisure Co. is a leading leisure travel company. We provide vacation experiences and travel inspiration to millions of owners, members, and subscribers through our diverse portfolio of products and services. Travel + Leisure Co. has the following segments as of December31, 2025: Vacation Ownership includes the worlds largest vacation ownership business based on number of owners and resorts, with 797,000 owner families and more than 280 vacation club resort locations.
